greetings: Well met, traveler. What brings you this way?
Ah, a fresh face. Welcome.
Good day to you. Don't see many strangers around here.
Hail, friend. You look like you've been on the road a while.
Welcome. Always good to see new folk pass through.
You've picked an interesting time to visit, I'll say that much.
Ho there. Come to trade, or just passing through?
Greetings. Make yourself comfortable, such as it is.
A visitor! That's a rare thing in these parts.
Well now, you don't look like trouble. That's a good start.
Afternoon. Or is it morning? Hard to keep track some days.
Come in, come in. No need to stand on ceremony here.
Didn't expect company today. But you're welcome all the same.
Well, hello there. You're a long way from anywhere, aren't you?
Another traveler. The road must be busy this season.
New in town? Or new to me, at least.
The road finally brought someone worth talking to. Welcome.
State your business, friend. Or don't. I'm just being polite.
You've got the look of someone who's been walking too long. Rest a moment.
Can I help you? I mean that genuinely, by the way.
Well, would you look at that. A new face around here.
You look like you could use a warm meal and a dry seat. Welcome.
Greetings, traveler. What news from the road?
A stranger! We don't get many. What brings you to our little corner?
Hail and well met. Mind the step on the way in.
Good to see someone new. Gets quiet around here without visitors.
You're braver than most, coming this way. Or more lost. Either way, welcome.
I was starting to think nobody new would pass through again. Glad to be wrong.
The gate hasn't seen a new face in weeks. You'll turn heads.
Come closer, let me get a look at you. Ah, a traveler. Welcome.
Step in from the cold. Or the heat. Whatever the weather is doing today.
A visitor from beyond the ridge. That's noteworthy.
You've got road dust on you. Must have come a fair way.
Don't mind the noise. It's always like this around here. Welcome.
I hope the road treated you kindly. You're safe enough here.
Fresh company! I was starting to go stale talking to the same three people.
You must be the traveler they mentioned at the gate. Come, sit.
I'll admit, I wasn't expecting anyone today. But here you are.
Welcome to our settlement. Small as it is, it's home.
Careful where you step. The ground around here has ideas of its own.
A newcomer! That's either very good or very bad. Let's find out which.
Well, the road brings all sorts. I'd say you're one of the better sorts.
Haven't seen your face before. That makes you interesting by default.
You picked a curious time to arrive, but we'll make the best of it.
You look like you've seen a few things on that road. Pull up a seat.
Hello, stranger. Don't worry, that title won't last long around here.
You've made it this far. That alone says something about you.
Traveler, is it? We could use some fresh perspective. Welcome.
I notice you're not from around here. That's perfectly fine.
Good day. I'd offer you something to drink, but I haven't got much.
You're the first new person I've seen in a tenday. Let me savor this.
Welcome. If you need anything, just speak up. We're not formal here.
The patrol mentioned someone coming up the road. That must be you.
Greetings. You've arrived at an interesting moment in our little story.
I see you found us. Not everyone does, tucked away as we are.
Ho, traveler. The road out here isn't for the faint of heart.
Good timing. You've arrived just before the rain. Or after it. Hard to tell.
A visitor! And one who looks like they can handle themselves. Welcome.
Step right in. We're not much, but we're honest folk.
Glad to see someone still travels these roads. We were beginning to wonder.
Hello, hello. Don't be shy. We're friendlier than we look.
You've got that wide-eyed look travelers get when they first see this place.
Welcome. Take a moment. Catch your breath. Then we'll talk.
A face I don't recognize. That's the best kind of surprise around here.
The wind blew you our way, did it? Well, welcome all the same.
New to the area, or just passing through? Either way, glad you're here.
You've come at a time when we could use some outside company.
I noticed you at the gate. Thought I'd introduce myself.
Well then. Here you are, and here I am. Welcome, for what it's worth.
The road in is worse than it looks, isn't it? Glad you made it.
We don't bite. Well, most of us don't. Welcome.
Good day, traveler. I hope our little settlement meets your expectations.
You look like someone with a story. I look like someone who wants to hear it.
Let me guess: you didn't come all this way for the scenery.
Fresh boots on old ground. That's always a welcome sight.
Welcome, stranger. You're among friends here, if you'll have us.
The fact that you're here tells me you're either brave or desperate. Welcome either way.
A visitor from beyond the valley. That's cause for a smile.
Good to meet you. I'd shake your hand, but mine are filthy. Welcome anyway.
You've got the bearing of someone who's been places. Come, tell me about them.
Ah, a new arrival. Let me be the first to welcome you properly.
Not every day we see a fresh face. Make yourself at home.
You look like the road has stories to tell, and you've heard most of them.
Traveler, welcome. I hope our hospitality makes up for our remoteness.
I've been expecting someone. Didn't know it would be you, but here we are.
Come, come. Don't stand in the doorway. That's a spot for drafts, not guests.
Another soul brave enough to venture out this way. You have my respect.
You must be tired. Rest here a while. We'll talk when you're ready.
Hail, friend. I use that word loosely, but I mean it sincerely.
Good day. Or good evening. Or good whatever it is by the time you got here.
Welcome to the edge of the known world. Or close enough.
I'd offer you the grand tour, but you can see most of it from where you're standing.
Well, you're here. That's half the battle. The other half is figuring out why.
You have an honest look about you. That's rare enough to mention.
I see we've got company. The good kind, I hope.
Welcome. Fair warning: once people start talking to you here, they don't stop.
Stranger on the road. That used to mean trouble. Now it just means company.
If you've come looking for something, you might just find it here.
I don't get out much, so I appreciate when the world comes to me. Welcome.
Step carefully: the path is rougher than it looks. But you're welcome here.
A visitor! Let me dust off my manners. It's been a while.
From the look of you, you've had quite the journey. Sit down, rest.
We're a quiet settlement. You might be the most exciting thing that happens this week.
Good to see someone new. Names and stories can come later. Just welcome.
Well met on the road. Though I suppose this isn't quite the road anymore.
You've got a traveler's eye. Always looking, always taking things in. I respect that.
Greetings, friend. I assume you've come here on purpose. Not everyone does.
Welcome. Don't let the quiet fool you. Plenty happens beneath the surface.
Not many make it out this far. You must have your reasons.
Well, come on then. I won't keep you standing in the sun.
A familiar road, a new face. The two best things a day can bring.
If you're here, you're welcome. That's our policy.
Hello, traveler. I'll admit, it's a relief to see someone who isn't a local.
The path here is long, but you made it. That counts for something.
Welcome. I'll answer what I can, if you've got questions.
You look like someone who didn't just wander in by accident.
Good day to you. If you need direction, I know these roads well enough.
A new face in the crowd. Or what passes for a crowd around here.
returnGreetings: Back again? Good to see a familiar face.
You've returned! I was wondering if you would.
Ah, you again. Settling in, are you?
Welcome back. The road treats you well, I hope.
I remember you. Glad you found your way back.
Returned so soon? Must be something keeping you around.
Well, well. Our paths cross again.
You're becoming a regular. Can't say I mind the company.
Back for more, eh? I admire your persistence.
Ah, the traveler returns. Pull up a seat.
I thought I might see you again. How have you been?
Still wandering these parts? You'll be one of us before long.
Good to see you again. Truly.
The familiar face returns. What's on your mind this time?
Well, look who's back. I was just thinking about you.
Welcome back. You're starting to feel like a local.
Twice now. People will start to talk.
Ah, you again! Still in one piece, I see.
Back already? The road must not be offering much competition.
I had a feeling you'd return. Something about the way you left.
Well, if it isn't my favorite traveler. Welcome back.
You're becoming a fixture around here. Not that I'm complaining.
Returned, have you? Good. I've got more to say.
I see the road brought you back to us. Or was it something else?
Welcome back, friend. It's been quieter without you.
There you are. I was starting to wonder when you'd turn up again.
Good timing. I was hoping you'd come back before the weather turned.
You again! Starting to think you like it here.
The prodigal traveler returns. What news do you bring?
Ah, a face I recognize. That's always a comfort.
I see you haven't forgotten about us. Good.
Back so soon? Not that I'm keeping track.
Welcome home. Or close enough to home, anyway.
I knew you'd be back. Call it intuition.
You've returned! Things have been dull since your last visit.
Well, you keep showing up. I suppose that means something.
I remember you. You're the one who actually listens.
Good to have you back. The walls were starting to close in.
I was telling someone about you just the other day. And here you are.
Returned for more? I've always got more.
Ah, there's a face that's seen the road and come back to tell about it.
You're a sight for tired eyes. Welcome back.
Didn't think I'd see you again this soon. But I'm glad I did.
You've come back. That either means good news or bad news.
Still kicking around these parts, I see. Good for you.
The road gives and the road takes. Today it gave you back to us.
I was beginning to think you'd moved on for good. Glad I was wrong.
Twice in my settlement. You must see something worth coming back for.
There you are. I've been saving a conversation for you.
Well, hello again. We left off somewhere interesting last time.
You look well. The road hasn't beaten you down yet.
I thought about our last talk after you left. Welcome back.
You keep coming back, and I keep being glad about it.
Another visit! At this rate, I'll have to give you a bed.
I see you've found your way back without getting lost. Impressive.
Good to see a known face. These days, that's a luxury.
Welcome back. I've got fresh gossip, if you're interested.
Returning traveler! You must have heard I had something to share.
I remember our last conversation. I suspect you do too.
Ah, the wanderer returns. Sit. Stay. Tell me things.
I've been keeping an eye out for you. Glad you showed.
Your timing is something else. I was just thinking about what you said last time.
You came back. Not everyone does. I appreciate it.
Still here, still talking. Glad you're still listening.
The fact that you returned says more than words could.
Welcome back. The settlement hasn't changed much, but I have thoughts.
You're becoming part of the landscape. In a good way.
Twice now. That's no accident. What's on your mind?
The gate guard mentioned you were coming. I made sure to be here.
I had a feeling today would be a good day. Seeing you confirms it.
You've returned in one piece. That's better than some manage.
Another visit, another conversation. I could get used to this.
Glad you made it back safely. The road's been worse than usual.
It's you again. The one person I don't mind seeing twice.
Welcome back, friend. Pull up something to sit on and let's talk.
I hoped you'd return. There are things I didn't say last time.
You're beginning to wear a groove in that road. Not that I mind.
Familiar face, fresh visit. What can I do for you?
You've come back at an interesting moment. More on that in a minute.
I was sorting through my thoughts when you appeared. Perfect timing.
Still making the rounds? Good. There's always more to learn.
You look like you've been busy since we last spoke.
I've thought of a dozen things to tell you since your last visit.
Welcome back. You're one of the few people I look forward to seeing.
Returned, and looking none the worse for it. Good.
I see the world hasn't swallowed you up yet. Welcome back.
You're getting to know this place better than some who live here.
Another visit from the traveler. The settlement is better for it.
Well, you didn't forget about us out here. That counts for something.
Back again. I must be better company than I thought.
Glad you turned up. I've got an update on something we discussed.
The return of a welcome face. Sit down and tell me everything.
I was running out of people to talk to. Your timing is perfect.
You're starting to leave tracks around here. The familiar kind.
I half expected you. The other half is pleasantly surprised.
You came back. That tells me something about your character.
It's you. Good. There's something I wanted to follow up on.
The road must agree with you. You look well.
Here you are again. I was starting to think you'd forgotten the way.
Glad you're back. I have something that might interest you.
Another day, another visit from my favorite outsider.
I see you haven't tired of us yet. Good. Neither have I tired of you.
You're becoming a known quantity around here. That's a compliment.
Two visits make a pattern. I like this pattern.
I've been saving something for you. A piece of news, not a thing.
Welcome back. The place perks up when you're around.
I recognize those footsteps. Come in, come in.
You've returned, and just in time. Things have been developing.
I see you took the same road in. Smart. It's the safest.
Still curious about this place? Good. I'm still willing to talk.
Glad to see a traveler who keeps their word. You said you'd be back.
You again! I was just thinking about something you mentioned last time.
The road brought you back. I like to think the conversation helped.
Welcome home, stranger. Or should I stop calling you that?
